content:
# Session 47 — recommendations

## For the next plan agent
1. **Continue terminal closeout — no prover dispatch.** No closable in-cone sorry exists. The leg is
   DELIVERED axiom-clean (`Grassmannian.represents`, B1–B7 assoc, ∀L `GSemiring`, invertible-L
   `GCommSemiring`, `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`); `SectionGradedRing.lean` is SORRY-FREE. Mechanical
   no-dispatch is the right call (11th consecutive).
2. **Do NOT dispatch a prover at the leandag "Ready to prove" def: nodes** — they are delivered-but-unmarked
   defs (anonymous-instance / abstract-concept `\lean{}` pins sync_leanok cannot resolve). They compile
   axiom-clean. NEVER dispatch a prover at a `def:` that already compiles.
3. **χ sorries (`QuotScheme.lean` L126/165/201/228) stay `sorry`** — genuinely cohomology/Snapper-gated;
   Mathlib lacks scheme cohomology at the pinned commit. Fill from the cohomology leg at merge.
   `RelativeSpec.lean` is out-of-cone likewise.
4. **Reverse signal:** dispatch a prover only if USER_HINTS opens the cohomology scope, or a genuine
   in-cone sorry surfaces.

## Blueprint doctor (merge-time, do NOT edit in this leg)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`: 2 phantom covers (`FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean` do not exist) + 13
  broken `\ref`.
- `Picard_GlueDescent.tex`: 4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`.
- `Picard_QuotScheme.tex`: 13 broken `\cref`.
These are single-commit extraction artifacts on inherited parent-blueprinted chapters outside the 3-seed
cone. No prover is dispatched near them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Editing them in this short-lived
leg only manufactures merge conflicts. Resolve at merge per Archon memory.

## Coverage debt
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls (single-commit extraction).
Merge-time; not this leg's debt.
